channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Can US-Iran peace ‘deal’ survive Israeli bombing of Lebanon?
item.description: Israel is blowing up buildings in Lebanon - and chances of a lasting deal to secure peace in the region.

item.title: Israel continues attacks on Lebanon despite US-Iran deal
item.description: Israel continues attacks on Lebanon despite US-Iran deal

item.title: Syrian activist Hassan Akkad detained in Damascus
item.description: Syrian journalist Mousa al-Omar reportedly filed a complaint about Akkad’s social media comments prior to his arrest.

item.title: Indian court rejects appeal over ban on Telegram app
item.description: The ruling comes after India said channels on the app were selling leaked questions for undergraduate entrance ​exams.

item.title: Achraf Hakimi, Morocco’s World Cup captain, to stand trial on rape charge
item.description: A French appeals court confirmed that Hakimi will face trial for the alleged rape of a woman in 2023, which he denies.

item.title: World Cup predictions: USA vs Australia, Brazil vs Haiti and more
item.description: USA face Australia as Brazil seek their first win, while Canada awaits injury news on Ismael Kone and Mexico celebrate.

item.title: US export ban on Anthropic’s AI models further strains alliances
item.description: Trump administration's move to cut off allies' access to advanced AI prompts calls for greater self-reliance.

item.title: For one Yemeni, World Cup serves as a marker of war and peace
item.description: Since 1982, a Yemeni fan's commitment to the World Cup has endured war, economic turmoil, and personal sacrifices.

item.title: World Cup: Who is Ayyoub Bouaddi, the French teenager playing for Morocco?
item.description: A promising midfielder marked for the French team, Bouaddi is a breakout sensation on his World Cup debut with Morocco.

item.title: US kills 3 in strike on alleged drug smuggling boat in Eastern Pacific
item.description: The attack is the latest in a series of strikes on vessels operated by 'narco-terrorists,' according to Washington.

item.title: Oil prices rise as Lebanon fighting erupts and Hormuz traffic still slow
item.description: Brent crude reverses slide after oil, LNG tankers cross critical waterway.

item.title: Fears for US-Iran deal as talks delayed by Israeli strikes on Lebanon
item.description: Tehran holds back from talks to cement ceasefire due to ongoing Israeli attacks on southern Lebanon.

item.title: Iran to lodge complaint with FIFA over World Cup 2026 travel restrictions
item.description: Team's complaint comes amid the denial of their request to fly to the United States two days before their next match.

item.title: Iran war day 112: Vance defends Tehran ‘deal’ but Switzerland trips are off
item.description: Vance backs US-Iran deal as Washington ends blockade and Iran hails wartime gains.

item.title: A world on trial: How lawyers documenting Israeli abuse pay a price
item.description: Behind the mounting evidence of crimes against Palestinians are the lawyers braving harassment and violence.

item.title: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha happy his mother will attend World Cup
item.description: The mother of Cape Verde’s star goalkeeper Vozinha has been granted a visa to enter the United States.

item.title: Burnham by-election victory raises stakes for Starmer
item.description: Andy Burnham wins the closely watched Makerfield by-election, a result likely to intensify scrutiny of UK Prime Minister

item.title: Behind the noise of an ‘Iran deal’, Palestine continues to burn
item.description: Israel's war on the Palestinians never stopped; the world just stopped watching.

item.title: Mexico beat South Korea, become first team to reach World Cup knockouts
item.description: Luis Romo's 50th-minute goal sent Mexico into the round of 32, which they will play on home soil, too.

item.title: Norway MP’s join viral World Cup ‘Viking Row’ trend
item.description: Norwegian lawmakers paused a parliamentary session on Thursday to perform the team's trademark “Viking Row” celebration.

item.title: Ukraine urges EU to pressure Russia to end war before winter
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy say his country will need help if the war with Russia continues into the winter.

item.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon in sudden clash surge with Hezbollah
item.description: Israel strikes southern Lebanon in sudden clash surge with Hezbollah

item.title: Andy Burnham wins key UK by-election, paving way to challenge Keir Starmer
item.description: Greater Manchester mayor's victory in Makerfield clears path for bid to unseat Starmer as prime minister.

item.title: Canada vs Qatar World Cup: 3 goals for David, 2 red cards, 1 injured Kone
item.description: BC Place was a battlefield as Kone was stretchered off, Qatar got two red cards, and both teams brawled after full-time.

item.title: Obama opens presidential centre with call for unity
item.description: Former US President Barack Obama opened his presidential centre in Chicago, using the occasion to call for unity.
